zh.lifeSummary: 當John Nicholson於1460年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親William Nicholson30歲，母親Anne Guest30歲。他於1480年與Elizabeth Hayward在英國越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Nicholson于1460年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲William Nicholson30岁，母亲Anne Guest30岁。他于1480年与Elizabeth Hayward在英国越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1520年在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)olas or the vernacular form Nic(h)ol + son; see Nichol , Nicholas . In Scotland the name was sometimes substituted for McNichol .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Nicolaisen or Nikolaisen , or of the Swedish cognate Niklasson, patronymics from equivalents of the personal name Nicholas .

variants.name: Nicolson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scottish Iain, Murdo.
English and Northern Scottish: variant of   Nicholson  .

variants.name: Nichol
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)ol(e), a vernacular form of Nic(h)olas (see Nicholas ). Compare Nickel and Nicol .

In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Greek Nikolas , its variant Nicolas , or of any of various derivatives of the personal name Nikola(o)s ‘Nicholas’, including Nikolis (see Nicoli ). Compare Nicholas and Nicol .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Nicholson was born in 1460, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Nicholson, was 30 and his mother, Anne Guest, was 30. He married Elizabeth Hayward in 1480, in Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1520, in Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Hayward en 1480, à Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. ja.lifeSummary: John Nicholsonが1460年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Nicholsonは30歳，母Anne Guestは30歳であった。1480年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキングストン ウプオン ハル スト マリーでElizabeth Haywardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングで60歳で死去した。

ko.Church of Saint Mary, Lowgate, Kingston: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스카버루 세인트 메리 위스 홀이 아포스틀레스

ko.lifeSummary: John Nicholson(이)가 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Nicholson(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Guest(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌 스트 메리에서 Elizabeth Hayward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hayward em 1480, em Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1520, em Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Nicholson родился в 1460 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Nicholson было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Guest, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hayward в 1480 г. в местности кингстон упон хулл ст мэри, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1520 г. в местности еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
